heading: Inventories of supplies not to be increased
label: 2348 Inventories of supplies not to be increased
text: Inventories of supplies for elements of the armed forces may not be increased for the purpose of transferring supplies under the authority of this subchapter.
notes: Amendments1989— substituted “this subchapter” for “this chapter”.Pub. L. 101–1891986— struck out “to military forces of any North Atlantic Treaty Organization country or any North Atlantic Treaty Organization subsidiary body” after “chapter”.Pub. L. 99–6611985— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 99–145section 2328 of this title1981— substituted “this chapter” for “this Act”.Pub. L. 97–22
